label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 5

extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won flat stage 5 sprint after major crash at 22km to go decimated leadout trains, beating JACOBSEN who had no pilot.
tactical_patterns: Decuninck-QuickStep avoided positioning chaos before 22km crash, arrived freshest while rivals expended energy regaining contact after hitting deck.
FDJ's leadout train fatigue from post-crash chase directly compromised DEMARE's finishing speed despite regaining peloton contact.
No deliberate breakaway chase until 22km suggests teams positioned for wind splits that never materialized, creating dangerous bunching.

rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: capitalized on rivals' crash chaos with clean run-in, suggesting superior team positioning awareness before incident
rider_signals.JACOBSEN Fabio: positive: nearly won despite losing entire leadout train to crash, raw speed remains potent when self-navigating finale
rider_signals.DEMARE Arnaud: negative: post-crash energy expenditure regaining contact directly hampered sprint watts, finished only 10th despite being pre-race favorite
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: lost 12 minutes suggesting severe injury or mechanical compounding 22km crash, GC ambitions effectively ended
rider_signals.TEUNISSEN Mike: positive: strong finish without traditional leadout indicates improved positioning instincts in chaotic sprint
rider_signals.TARAMAE Rein: negative: crashed second consecutive day despite wearing leader's jersey, positioning discipline questionable for protected rider
